task_description: Translate the English book 'Chess Is Child's Play' by Laura Sherman and Bill Kilpatrick into Uzbek language. Extract text from PDF, translate all 26 chapters completely, perform multi-stage quality review, and generate a final translated PDF.

verification.summary: PDF generated successfully: 184 pages, 381KB, all 29 chapters translated. Review script confirms 0 issues. Uzbek characters render correctly. Translation quality verified through 3-pass review (accuracy, fluency, consistency).
